en:
When destroyed, gives [points:+3].

Can be fired by [block:pirate_cannoneer] blocks, launching a [yellow]Cannonball[white] that destroys the entire [yellow]Column[white].
After placing your last [yellow]Piece[white], gain 15% of your [yellow]Target Score[white] as [points]
After placing your last [yellow]Piece[white], gain 20% of your [yellow]Target Score[white] as [points]

When destroyed, releases two [yellow]Fireballs[white] that burns up to 3 [yellow]Blocks[white], granting [multiplier:+5] per [yellow]Block[white].

[yellow]Fireball[white] bounces off the wall.
After placing your last [yellow]Piece[white], gain 10% of your [yellow]Target Score[white] as [points]
After placing your last [yellow]Piece[white], gain 25% of your [yellow]Target Score[white] as [points]
After placing your last [yellow]Piece[white], gain 40% of your [yellow]Target Score[white] as [points]
When destroyed, activates the effect of every [group:arcane] block without destroying them.
[points] given by [yellow]Blocks[white] of your initial deck are multiplied [yellow]x2[white].
If you clear [yellow]3 or more lines[white] in a single combo, gain [multiplier:x2].
When destroyed, triggers all [group:casino] effects without destroying the blocks.
When destroyed, awards [points:1-3] or [multiplier:1-3] multiplied by the current [yellow]Level[white].
Clearing LESS than four [yellow]Rows[white] multiplies your [points] by [yellow]0.5x[white].
Use the hold button to save pieces, but your [yellow]Target Score[white] increases 10% each time.
Reach your [yellow]Target Score[white] to win and unlock new [yellow]Blocks[white]. [red]Red levels[white] gives a [perk]!
You lose if [yellow]Pieces[white] run out or [yellow]Blocks[white] reach the screen top.
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] within [yellow]2 seconds[white] after it spawns, you gain [points:+3].
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] within [yellow]2 seconds[white] after it spawns, you gain [points:+10].
Welcome to [yellow]Stackflow[white]! This strategic block-stacking game is all about smart placement and management.
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] within [yellow]2 seconds[white] after it spawns, you gain [points:+25].
When destroyed, randomly awards [points:1-4] multiplied by the current [yellow]Level[white].
Watch your Score, [points], and [multiplier] at the top. These drive your progress!
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] within [yellow]2 seconds[white] after it spawns, you gain [points:+35].
Place [yellow]Blocks[white] to complete lines. Each line gives [blue]+10 Points[white] plus [multiplier] bonuses.
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] within [yellow]2 seconds[white] after it spawns, you gain [points:+100].
Check upcoming [yellow]Pieces[white] and track what's remaining in your deck. Plan ahead wisely!
When destroyed, has [yellow]15%[white] chance to give [points:+1000] but an 85% chance to lose [points:-100]!
Gain [multiplier:+5] for clearing four [yellow]Rows[white]. Clearing four [yellow]Rows[white] accumulates [red]+5[white] to this bonus. Persists through [yellow]Levels[white].
When destroyed, gives [multiplier:+1] for each [block:worker_bee] block multiplied by the number of [block:queen_bee] blocks.
When destroyed, gives [blue]+0.3 Point[white] for each [yellow]Block[white] on the board.
When destroyed, randomly awards [multiplier:1-4] multiplied by the current [yellow]Level[white].
[yellow]Pieces[white] will automatically be placed [yellow]3 seconds[white] after it spawns. You gain [points:+10] every time a [yellow]Piece[white] is placed.
You can't use [yellow]Hold[white]. Instead it'll sacrifice your current [yellow]Piece[white] to reduce the [yellow]Target Score[white] by [yellow]5%[white].
When destroyed, gives [multiplier:+0.1] for each [yellow]Block[white] on the board.
When destroyed, gives [multiplier:+1] and shoots all [block:cannon] blocks on the board.
When destroyed, creates a new [block:slime] in a random gap in a lower [yellow]Row[white].
You lose the preview of where the [yellow]Piece[white] is going to land.
Masterful! The chaos fears your precision.
Victory! The blocks bow to you.
After [yellow]5s[white], explodes a [yellow]3x3[white] area around it, giving [points:+3] for each [yellow]Block[white].
Brilliant! The RNG smiles upon you.
When destroyed, multiplies [points] by [blue]x2[white], but multiplies your [multiplier] by [red]x0.75[white].
When a [yellow]Block[white] is placed, gives [points:+0.5] for each adjacent [group:colony] block.
When a [group:casino] block is destroyed, gives [points:+0.5] for each [group:colony] block on the board.
When destroyed, releases a flying [yellow]Bone[white] that shatters the first [yellow]Block[white] it hits, giving [points:+5] per [yellow]Block[white].
Clearing a [yellow]Combo[white] starts a 15s timer. Each successive [yellow]Combo[white] grants an additional [points:+10] that accumulates and refreshes the timer.
When destroyed, activates the effect of every [group:explosives] blocks.
When destroyed, activates the effect of every [group:harmony] block without destroying them.
Discover the various [yellow]Perks[white] that can aid you in your run.
When destroyed, explodes adjacent [yellow]Blocks[white], giving [points:+3] each.

When destroyed, gives [points:+10].

Every 5.0s, a random adjacent [yellow]Block[white] becomes [block:uranium] if it is not [group:nuclear].
When destroyed, transforms all adjacent [yellow]Blocks[white] into [block:hive].
Select a perk to upgrade permanently your run.
Prevents you from using the [yellow]Hold[white] function.
When a [yellow]Row[white] is cleared, you gain [multiplier:+10] and [points:+1].
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] without rotating it, gain [multiplier:+5].
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] without rotating it, gain [multiplier:+8].
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] without rotating it, gain [multiplier:+12].
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] without rotating it, gain [multiplier:+15].
If you place a [yellow]Piece[white] without rotating it, gain [multiplier:+30].

You've reached the end of the available content. We hope you enjoyed this preview of what's to come.

If you'd like to follow the game's development, add Stackflow to your Steam wishlist to get notified when the Early Access begins!
Procceding will reset your control bindings to default. Are you sure?
Get [multiplier:100] or more on a single combo.
Settles into any empty holes upon landing.
When explode, add one random block to the deck.
Multiply multipliers by 1.5 when destroyed last.
When destroyed, has [yellow]20%[white] chance to explode and gives [multiplier:+20] but an 80% chance to give nothing!
When destroyed, clears all blocks of the same color/type currently on the board and converts them all into Chips (each cleared space = 10 chips).
If you clear the [yellow]Board[white] completely, multiplies [points] by [blue]x3[white] and [multiplier] by [red]x3[white].

When destroyed, gives [points:+25].

Transforms all [yellow]Blocks[white] in a 2x2 area around it into a different [yellow]Block[white].
When a [yellow]Row[white] is cleared, you gain [points:+10] and [multiplier:+1].
When destroyed, gives [multiplier:+1] and converts a random [yellow]Block[white] on the board into [yellow]Radioactive[white].
When destroyed, gives [points:+4] multiplied by the number of [block:piano] blocks on the same [yellow]Row[white].

When destroyed, explodes its [yellow]Column[white], giving [points:+1] per [yellow]Block[white].

[group:nuclear] blocks give [points:+5] instead.
Get to know the [red]Bosses[white] that challenge you every third [yellow]Level[white].
Only available on the full version of the game.
Gain [points:+10] for clearing a single [yellow]Row[white]. Clearing single [yellow]Rows[white] accumulates [blue]+10[white] to this bonus. Persists through [yellow]Levels[white].
Select a new type of block to appear on your board.
When destroyed, gives [points:+4] multiplied by the number of [block:electric_guitar] blocks in the same [yellow]Column[white].
When destroyed, has [yellow]50%[white] chance to give [points:+100] but a 50% chance to give nothing!
Adjacent [group:colony] block bonuses are multiplied by [yellow]x2[white].
Using [yellow]Hold[white] won't increase your [yellow]Target Score[white] anymore.

When destroyed, gives [points:+3].

Adjacent [yellow]Iron[white] and [yellow]Bronze[white] bonuses are multiplied by [yellow]x3[white].
When destroyed, explodes a [yellow]3x3[white] area around it, giving [multiplier:+1] for each [yellow]Block[white].
When a [yellow]Block[white] is placed, gives [multiplier:+0.5] for each adjacent [group:colony] block.
Procceding will reset your progress. Are you sure?

When destroyed, releases an [yellow]Undead Arm[white].

[yellow]Undead Arm[white] gives [points:+5] for each [yellow]Block[white] it hits. Can hit a maximum of 5 [yellow]Blocks[white].
When destroyed, gives [multiplier:+2] multiplied by the number of [block:acoustic_guitar] blocks in the same [yellow]Column[white].
Hides the [yellow]Pieces Left[white], [yellow]Next Piece[white], and [yellow]Hold[white] displays.
Each time a [group:nuclear] block spreads, gain [multiplier:+1].

When destroyed, gives [multiplier:+3].

Transforms a random [yellow]Block[white] on the board into a different [yellow]Block[white].
Learn about the [yellow]Blocks[white] you may find during the game.

When destroyed, gives [points:+3] and command all [block:pirate_cannoneer] blocks to shoot [yellow]Knives[white].

Each [yellow]Knife[white] destroys the first [yellow]Block[white] it hits.
